title: Biden Calls Chinese President Xi Jinping A "Dictator"
description: U.S. President Joe Biden on Tuesday called Chinese President Xi Jinping a dictator, adding that Xi was very embarrassed when a Chinese balloon was blown off cou...
keywords: Joe Biden, Xi Jinping, xi jinping dictator, Biden calls xi jinping dictator
snippet:
Joe Biden's comment comes a day after Secretary of State Antony Blinken met Xi Jinping in Beijing.
